fields.label: Debug mode
fields.description: Verbose server-side logging of prompts / usage (never shown to the guest). Disable in production.

fields.label: LLM connection slug
fields.description: Slug of the core LLM Connection to use. Empty selects the active default. No API key is stored here — the key lives in the core LLM connection.

fields.label: Persona
fields.description: Persona text steering the consultant + sales-agent voice.

fields.label: Offer referral reward
fields.description: Offer a referral discount on a buy intent so a redeemed sale credits the bot's token balance (S92).

fields.label: Retrieval mode
fields.description: Corpus retrieval backend. FTS is the baseline (no external vector DB).

fields.label: Corpus directory
fields.description: Directory of the static sales corpus (.md and .pdf). ${VBWD_VAR_DIR} is resolved at runtime.
